case_summary: Kitchen sink draining very slowly with rising odour — straightforward blocked-drain routing.

ground_truth.notes: Easy, high-confidence case. Useful as a baseline 'we should never get this wrong' anchor. If routing or trade ever regresses on this case, the regression is severe.

inputs.user_text: Our kitchen sink has been draining slower and slower for the last two weeks and now it's barely draining at all. There's a really nasty smell coming from the drain itself. Pouring hot water down doesn't help, and we tried a drain unblocker from the shop but it didn't make much difference.
